models.description: Flagship vision-language model of Qwen and also a significant leap from the previous Qwen2-VL.

models.description: Qwen3 is the latest generation of large language models in Qwen series, offering a comprehensive suite of dense and mixture-of-experts (MoE) models.

models.name: qwen3-coder
models.description: Alibaba's performant long context models for agentic and coding tasks.

models.name: qwen3-coder-next
models.description: Qwen3-Coder-Next is a coding-focused language model from Alibaba's Qwen team, optimized for agentic coding workflows and local development.

models.name: qwen3-embedding
models.description: Building upon the foundational models of the Qwen3 series, Qwen3 Embedding provides a comprehensive range of text embeddings models in various sizes

models.name: qwen3-next
models.description: The first installment in the Qwen3-Next series with strong performance in terms of both parameter efficiency and inference speed.

models.name: qwen3-vl
models.description: The most powerful vision-language model in the Qwen model family to date.

models.name: qwen3.5
models.description: Qwen 3.5 is a family of open-source multimodal models that delivers exceptional utility and performance.

models.name: qwen3.6
models.description: Qwen3.6 delivers substantial upgrades in agentic coding and thinking preservation than previous Qwen models.

models.name: qwq
models.description: QwQ is the reasoning model of the Qwen series.

models.name: r1-1776
models.description: A version of the DeepSeek-R1 model that has been post trained to provide unbiased, accurate, and factual information by Perplexity.

models.name: reader-lm
models.description: A series of models that convert HTML content to Markdown content, which is useful for content conversion tasks.

models.name: reflection
models.description: A high-performing model trained with a new technique called Reflection-tuning that teaches a LLM to detect mistakes in its reasoning and correct course.

models.name: rnj-1
models.description: Rnj-1 is a family of 8B parameter open-weight, dense models trained from scratch by Essential AI, optimized for code and STEM with capabilities on par with SOTA open-weight models.

models.name: sailor2
models.description: Sailor2 are multilingual language models made for South-East Asia. Available in 1B, 8B, and 20B parameter sizes.

models.name: samantha-mistral
models.description: A companion assistant trained in philosophy, psychology, and personal relationships. Based on Mistral.

models.name: shieldgemma
models.description: ShieldGemma is set of instruction tuned models for evaluating the safety of text prompt input and text output responses against a set of defined safety policies.

models.name: smallthinker
models.description: A new small reasoning model fine-tuned from the Qwen 2.5 3B Instruct model.

models.name: smollm
models.description: 🪐 A family of small models with 135M, 360M, and 1.7B parameters, trained on a new high-quality dataset.

models.name: smollm2
models.description: SmolLM2 is a family of compact language models available in three size: 135M, 360M, and 1.7B parameters.

models.name: snowflake-arctic-embed
models.description: A suite of text embedding models by Snowflake, optimized for performance.

models.name: snowflake-arctic-embed2
models.description: Snowflake's frontier embedding model. Arctic Embed 2.0 adds multilingual support without sacrificing English performance or scalability.

models.name: solar
models.description: A compact, yet powerful 10.7B large language model designed for single-turn conversation.

models.name: solar-pro
models.description: Solar Pro Preview: an advanced large language model (LLM) with 22 billion parameters designed to fit into a single GPU

models.name: sqlcoder
models.description: SQLCoder is a code completion model fined-tuned on StarCoder for SQL generation tasks

models.name: stable-beluga
models.description: Llama 2 based model fine tuned on an Orca-style dataset. Originally called Free Willy.

models.name: stable-code
models.description: Stable Code 3B is a coding model with instruct and code completion variants on par with models such as Code Llama 7B that are 2.5x larger.

models.name: stablelm-zephyr
models.description: A lightweight chat model allowing accurate, and responsive output without requiring high-end hardware.

models.name: stablelm2
models.description: Stable LM 2 is a state-of-the-art 1.6B and 12B parameter language model trained on multilingual data in English, Spanish, German, Italian, French, Portuguese, and Dutch.

models.name: starcoder
models.description: StarCoder is a code generation model trained on 80+ programming languages.

models.name: starcoder2
models.description: StarCoder2 is the next generation of transparently trained open code LLMs that comes in three sizes: 3B, 7B and 15B parameters.

models.name: starling-lm
models.description: Starling is a large language model trained by reinforcement learning from AI feedback focused on improving chatbot helpfulness.

models.name: tinydolphin
models.description: An experimental 1.1B parameter model trained on the new Dolphin 2.8 dataset by Eric Hartford and based on TinyLlama.

models.name: tinyllama
models.description: The TinyLlama project is an open endeavor to train a compact 1.1B Llama model on 3 trillion tokens.

models.name: translategemma
models.description: A new collection of open translation models built on Gemma 3, helping people communicate across 55 languages.

models.name: tulu3
models.description: Tülu 3 is a leading instruction following model family, offering fully open-source data, code, and recipes by the The Allen Institute for AI.

models.name: vicuna
models.description: General use chat model based on Llama and Llama 2 with 2K to 16K context sizes.

models.name: wizard-math
models.description: Model focused on math and logic problems

models.name: wizard-vicuna
models.description: Wizard Vicuna is a 13B parameter model based on Llama 2 trained by MelodysDreamj.

models.name: wizard-vicuna-uncensored
models.description: Wizard Vicuna Uncensored is a 7B, 13B, and 30B parameter model based on Llama 2 uncensored by Eric Hartford.

models.name: wizardcoder
models.description: State-of-the-art code generation model

models.name: wizardlm
models.description: General use model based on Llama 2.

models.name: wizardlm-uncensored
models.description: Uncensored version of Wizard LM model

models.name: wizardlm2
models.description: State of the art large language model from Microsoft AI with improved performance on complex chat, multilingual, reasoning and agent use cases.

models.name: xwinlm
models.description: Conversational model based on Llama 2 that performs competitively on various benchmarks.

models.name: yarn-llama2
models.description: An extension of Llama 2 that supports a context of up to 128k tokens.

models.name: yarn-mistral
models.description: An extension of Mistral to support context windows of 64K or 128K.

models.name: yi
models.description: Yi 1.5 is a high-performing, bilingual language model.

models.name: yi-coder
models.description: Yi-Coder is a series of open-source code language models that delivers state-of-the-art coding performance with fewer than 10 billion parameters.

models.name: zephyr
models.description: Zephyr is a series of fine-tuned versions of the Mistral and Mixtral models that are trained to act as helpful assistants.
